notes: After initial loading screen the display goes dark.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Boots up, shows loading screen and all is great but after that goes into a black screen and gets no further
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: If you rename "campaign" folder in "Thronebreaker/Thronebreaker_Data/StreamingAssets/videos/" game will load to main menu but after that my mouse didn't work. I was unable to click and select anything for example start a new game.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Seems WINE can't play MP4 files. When you remove  "campign" folder you can go to game menu. You can play the game. Mouse works. Set WINE as "emulate virtual desktop".
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Renamed the campaign directory as mentioned elsewhere, no problems running the game after that
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Renaming the campaign directory allows the game to start, but it is unstable and looks like some graphic bugs, for example some tutorial boxes don't seem to work as they are intended. Also got stuck at the camp in the deck construction and had to force quit the game.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Runs with video cutscenes after using github.com/z0z0z/mf-install, on proton 4.2. Very minor graphical glitches, and crashes every half-hour or so, but everything is functional besides that.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Used github.com/z0z0z/mf-install, as stated in other report. After that the game worked past intro videos but crashed regularily after 20-30 minutes of play. After disabling both esync and Steam Overlay, I was able to play for two hours straight without a crash. Everything works perfectly, game running in windowed fullscreen.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Need to install https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install. Crashes every half an hour, sometimes hangs after skipping intro, but game itself is playable.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: Install https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install, disable Esync and Steam overlay. If game hangs after intro, disable it as described in https://www.gog.com/forum/thronebreaker_the_witcher_tales/how_to_skip_diable_intro_videos_tutorial. No notable issues found after 6 hours of gameplay.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales

notes: As noted by someone before me, I installed media foundation workaround and disabled the intro. After this it works perfectly and without any issues.
title: Thronebreaker: The Witcher Tales
